title: Add and subtract on the number line word problems
description: Practice solving addition or subtraction word problems using a number line. All items include 4 two-digit numbers.
topic_path: Addition and subtraction within 100 word problems (multi-step)
Add and subtract on the number line word problems

assessment_items.question_content:
Cara had a tower with $42$ blocks.  

She added $12$ red blocks, $14$ more blue blocks, and $16$ purple blocks.    

**Which number line shows how to find how many blocks Cara's tower has total?**

[[☃ radio 1]]

**How many blocks does Cara's tower have now?**

[[☃ numeric-input 1]] blocks
hints:
Cara started with $\goldE{42}$ blocks.

![A number line starts at 42.](web+graphie:${☣ LOCALPATH}/images/c9b85cdf6fc6ea7dec183e382b71fb56ec108384)

To add on the number line, we jump to the **right**.

She added $\maroonD{12}$ red blocks.

![A number line starts at 42 with plus 12 and goes to 54. ](web+graphie:${☣ LOCALPATH}/images/f15dc51d49971122f27a0e43f4646f84501c0957)

$\goldE{42} + \maroonD{12} = 54$

Then she added $\blueE{14}$ blue blocks.

![A number line starts at 42 with plus 12 and goes to 54. From 54 plus 14 goes to 68. ](web+graphie:${☣ LOCALPATH}/images/c7a1d9da27f3dd9cef6bfc82e92a361e53a529e6)

$54+  \blueE{14} = 68$

Last, she added $\purpleD{16}$ purple blocks.

![A number line starts at 42 with plus 12 and goes to 54. From 54 plus 14 goes to 68. From 68 plus 16 goes to 84.](web+graphie:${☣ LOCALPATH}/images/d84081345b7a5dde58902b42bbcc24ec9be37384)

$68+\purpleD{16} = 84$

This number line represents how to find Cara's total number of blocks:

![A number line starts at 42 with plus 12 and goes to 54. From 54 plus 14 goes to 68. From 68 plus 16 goes to ?.](web+graphie:${☣ LOCALPATH}/images/c8eead4c70d641d91b2b486cbed861378ccb68bd)

Cara had $84$ total blocks.

choices.content: ![A number line starts at 42 with plus 12 and goes to 54. From 54 plus 14 goes to 68. From 68 plus 16 goes to ?.](web+graphie:${☣ LOCALPATH}/images/a9fa104afc5c8c7ebe130b0cf5586fa0d910d6f2)
![A number line starts at 0 with plus 12 and goes to 12. From 12 plus 14 goes to 26. From 26 plus 16 goes to ?.](web+graphie:${☣ LOCALPATH}/images/bebe454853d8c8efecfcf7127c196857d6fa847f)

assessment_items.question_content:
Before today, Mrs. Bain had given a total of $30$ awards.  

Today, Mrs. Bain gave $11$ more spelling awards,  $36$ more science awards, and $18$ more math awards.      

**Which number line shows how to find how many total awards Mrs. Bain has given?**

[[☃ radio 1]]


**How many awards has Mrs. Bain now given?**  

[[☃ numeric-input 1]] awards
hints:
Mrs. Bain gave away $\goldE{30}$ awards before today.

![A number line starts at 30.](web+graphie:${☣ LOCALPATH}/images/1ff029e47b3dcd3343e05a1fcbf8382f9b93ef2c)

To add on the number line, we jump to the **right**.

Then she gave away $\maroonD{11}$ spelling awards.

![A number line starts at 30 with plus 11 and goes to 41. ](web+graphie:${☣ LOCALPATH}/images/0b2662131c96d0e21ceb1a84106c8fe15204b3c6)

$\goldE{30} + \maroonD{11} = 41$

Then she gave away $\blueE{36}$ science awards.

![A number line starts at 30 with plus 11 and goes to 41. From 41 plus 36 goes to 77. ](web+graphie:${☣ LOCALPATH}/images/9c14cd0f673675e8d3393b2409106f5e6b68a3cb)

$41+  \blueE{36} = 77$

Last, she gave away $\purpleD{18}$ math awards.

![A number line starts at 30 with plus 11 and goes to 41. From 41 plus 36 goes to 77. From 77 plus 18 goes to 95.](web+graphie:${☣ LOCALPATH}/images/416db8bac4c6725d9728033428b2d5b99fa5c0ba)

$77+\purpleD{18} = 95$

This number line represents how to find the total number of awards Mrs. Bain gave away:

![A number line starts at 30 with plus 11 and goes to 41. From 41 plus 36 goes to 77. From 77 plus 18 goes to ?.](web+graphie:${☣ LOCALPATH}/images/73b1023d8c52ca23de0b2a2c782e31d6dcceba2e)

Mrs. Bain gave $95$ total awards.

choices.content: ![A number line starts at 30 with plus 10 and goes to 40. From 40 plus 36 goes to 76. From 76 plus 18 goes to ?.](web+graphie:${☣ LOCALPATH}/images/fcb889a31abc411032418dfa04d395675abd2c72)
![A number line starts at 30 with plus 11 and goes to 41. From 41 plus 36 goes to 77. From 77 plus 18 goes to ?.](web+graphie:${☣ LOCALPATH}/images/73b1023d8c52ca23de0b2a2c782e31d6dcceba2e)

assessment_items.question_content:
Ying ran $18$ laps for Running Club.  

Then, Ying ran $14$ more laps before school, $13$ more laps at lunch, and $20$ more laps at recess.  

**Which number line shows how to find how many total laps Ying has run?**

[[☃ radio 1]]

**How many laps has Ying run?**  

[[☃ numeric-input 1]] laps
hints:
Ying ran $\goldE{18}$ laps at running club.

![A number line starts at 18.](web+graphie:${☣ LOCALPATH}/images/ee0c812ea914e50c528cfe76eb1dca0fd85bfa23)

To add on the number line, we jump to the **right**.

Then Ying ran $\maroonD{14}$ more laps before school.

![A number line starts at 18 with plus 14 and goes to 32. ](web+graphie:${☣ LOCALPATH}/images/aab5d43169f6ec61e18a272ead680d625f379ad1)

$\goldE{18} + \maroonD{14} = 32$

Then Ying ran $\blueE{13}$ more laps at lunch.

![A number line starts at 18 with plus 14 and goes to 32. From 32 plus 13 goes to 45. ](web+graphie:${☣ LOCALPATH}/images/a9a6b18773d39b5807e205a4a8996913e6c5b6b1)

$32+  \blueE{13} = 45$

At recess, Ying ran $\purpleD{20}$ laps.

![A number line starts at 18 with plus 14 and goes to 32. From 32 plus 13 goes to 45. From 45 plus 20 goes to 65.](web+graphie:${☣ LOCALPATH}/images/7a690df9fd07414aba55666e1c5c1e74506696bf)

$45+\purpleD{20} = 65$

This number line represents how to find total laps Ying has run:

![A number line starts at 18 with plus 14 and goes to 32. From 32 plus 13 goes to 45. From 45 plus 20 goes to ?.](web+graphie:${☣ LOCALPATH}/images/7e482dea8794abef55cd12964849ba2f4bd0dbf0)

Ying ran $65$ laps.

choices.content: ![A number line starts at 0 with plus 14 and goes to 14. From 14 plus 13 goes to 27. From 27 plus 20 goes to ?.](web+graphie:${☣ LOCALPATH}/images/8fc1f0f55f68d2cefc6f552c452ec50c7aa3d7f0)
![A number line starts at 18 with plus 14 and goes to 32. From 32 plus 13 goes to 45. From 45 plus 20 goes to ?.](web+graphie:${☣ LOCALPATH}/images/7e482dea8794abef55cd12964849ba2f4bd0dbf0)

assessment_items.question_content:
The Dallas Cowboys had $13$ points at halftime.

Then, the Cowboys scored $14$ more points in the third quarter and $21$ more points in the fourth quarter.  

**Which number line shows how to find how many total points the Cowboys scored in the game?**

[[☃ radio 1]]

**How many total points did the Cowboys score in the game?** 
 
[[☃ numeric-input 1]] points
hints:
The cowboys scored $\goldE{13}$ points at halftime.

![A number line starts at 13 extending to the right.](web+graphie:${☣ LOCALPATH}/images/ba74fc4d1d3edcfe60c862c78492bacf3afa400b)

To add on the number line, we jump to the **right**.

Then the Cowboys scored $\maroonD{14}$ points in the third quarter.

![A number line starts at 13 with plus 14 and goes to 27. ](web+graphie:${☣ LOCALPATH}/images/9df842e3c7aab4ae1f206d60837701e26166a012)

$\goldE{13} + \maroonD{14} = 27$

The cowboys scored $\blueE{21}$ points in the fourth quarter.

![A number line starts at 13 with plus 14 and goes to 27. From 27 plus 21 goes to 48.](web+graphie:${☣ LOCALPATH}/images/6c98f8f45a19f32adf06a5f52d45251544da210b)

$27+  \blueE{21} = 48$

This number line represents how to find the total points the Cowboys scored:

![A number line starts at 13 with plus 14 and goes to 27. From 27 plus 21 goes to ?.](web+graphie:${☣ LOCALPATH}/images/0c9c364aa09c1bd5c773d8a2f2a09415f84c3f2c)

The Cowboys scored $48$ points.

choices.content: ![A number line starts at 13 with plus 13 and goes to 26. From 26 plus 14 goes to 40. From 40 plus 21 goes to ?.](web+graphie:${☣ LOCALPATH}/images/fba491eb1351fc6a92bb71b4794f4041c2e6f3d2)
![A number line starts at 13 with plus 14 and goes to 27. From 27 plus 21  goes to ?.](web+graphie:${☣ LOCALPATH}/images/0c9c364aa09c1bd5c773d8a2f2a09415f84c3f2c)

assessment_items.question_content:
Before lunch time, Anna caught $27$ fish.  

Anna caught $19$ more fish after lunch and $28$ more fish after dinner.  

**Which number line shows how to find how many total fish Anna caught by the end of the day?**

[[☃ radio 1]]

**How many total fish had Anna caught by the end of the day?**  

[[☃ numeric-input 1]] fish
hints:
Anna caught $\goldE{27}$ fish before lunch.

![A number line starts at 27 and extends to the right.](web+graphie:${☣ LOCALPATH}/images/5ccd3baf18041074f86374dad6f5b4881dc62305)

To add on the number line, we jump to the **right**.

Then Anna caught $\maroonD{19}$ more fish after lunch.

![A number line starts at 27 with plus 19 and goes to 46.](web+graphie:${☣ LOCALPATH}/images/e7ca01f1180c5314354db46c67ebc42e32d1a8d2)

$\goldE{27} + \maroonD{19} = 46$

After dinner, Anna caught $\blueE{28}$ fish.

![A number line starts at 27 with plus 19 and goes to 46. From 46 plus 28 goes to 74.](web+graphie:${☣ LOCALPATH}/images/9d9e56b90c7ac0b6f933e6bdaa9544e46bb95713)

$46+  \blueE{28} = 74$

This number line represents how to find the total number of fish that Anna caught:

![A number line starts at 27 with plus 19 and goes to 46. From 46 plus 28 goes to  ?.](web+graphie:${☣ LOCALPATH}/images/1bf1032ab550b766e3e42e36b6797e944714e3c1)

Anna caught $74$ fish.

choices.content: ![A number line starts at 27 with plus 27 and goes to 54. From 54 plus 19  goes to 73. From 73 plus 28  goes to ?.](web+graphie:${☣ LOCALPATH}/images/6976812c0bb2a258323b7a6ad71db2d91f31a70b)
![A number line starts at 27 with plus 19 and goes to 46. From 46 plus 28 goes to  ?.](web+graphie:${☣ LOCALPATH}/images/1bf1032ab550b766e3e42e36b6797e944714e3c1)

assessment_items.question_content:
Mom had $19$ pennies.   

Then, Mom found $23$ more pennies in the couch, $31$ more pennies in the car, and $15$ more pennies under the rug.    

**Which number line shows how to find how many total pennies Mom has now?**

[[☃ radio 1]]


**How many pennies does Mom have now?**  

[[☃ numeric-input 1]] pennies
hints:
Mom had $\goldE{19}$ pennies.

![A number line starts at 19 and extends to the right.](web+graphie:${☣ LOCALPATH}/images/04a36fde7fe12ee2c83c7e0b163190baf06c3d65)

To add on the number line, we jump to the **right**.

Then she found $\maroonD{23}$ pennies in the couch. 

![A number line starts at 19 with plus 23 and goes to 42. ](web+graphie:${☣ LOCALPATH}/images/983a9f63592c47d650dca84bf9f7977b7e449789)

$\goldE{19} + \maroonD{23}= 42$

Mom found $\blueE{31}$ pennies in the car.

![A number line starts at 19 with plus 23 and goes to 42. From 42 plus 31 goes to 73. ](web+graphie:${☣ LOCALPATH}/images/adb0d67303b56530cd2b54201991c3dbadcbe6ad)

$42+  \blueE{31} = 73$

Then Mom found $\purpleD{15}$ pennies under the rug. 

![A number line starts at 19 with plus 23 and goes to 42. From 42 plus 31 goes to 73. From 73 plus 15 goes to 88.](web+graphie:${☣ LOCALPATH}/images/26db789d9b3aee899390ca943dae8e3f1cd95b02)

$73+\purpleD{15} = 88$

This number line represents how to find the total pennies Mom has now:

![A number line starts at 19 with plus 23 and goes to 42. From 42 plus 31 goes to 73. From 73 plus 15 goes to  ?.](web+graphie:${☣ LOCALPATH}/images/f0b46dff3dbfdcb7fbcac773562176d85e21131e)

Mom has $88$ pennies.

choices.content: ![A number line starts at 0 with plus 23 and goes to 23. From 23 plus 31 goes to 54. From 54 plus 15 goes to  ?.](web+graphie:${☣ LOCALPATH}/images/fb0974f4c61cce8fd4615f105dc5277f06bd9d73)
![A number line starts at 19 with plus 23 and goes to 42. From 42 plus 31 goes to 73. From 73 plus 15 goes to  ?.](web+graphie:${☣ LOCALPATH}/images/f0b46dff3dbfdcb7fbcac773562176d85e21131e)

assessment_items.question_content:
Jack had $89$ magic beans.  

He gave $32$ magic beans to his sister, $24$ to his best friend, and he planted $18$ magic beans.  

**Which number line shows how to find how many magic beans Jack has left?**  

[[☃ radio 2]]  

**How many magic beans does Jack have left?**

[[☃ numeric-input 1]] magic beans
hints:
Jack has $\goldE{89}$ magic beans.

![The number line is labeled on the right with 89 and extends to the left.](web+graphie:${☣ LOCALPATH}/images/c42d62a1d7bcdaf7392775b7eac47e69d3287d21)

To subtract on the number line, we jump to the **left**.

He gave $\maroonD{32}$ magic beans to his sister.

![Starting on the right with 89 move left minus 32 and goes to 57.](web+graphie:${☣ LOCALPATH}/images/8b2753cc23138e3338e31591114562565e9e6a00)

$\goldE{89} - \maroonD{32} = 57$

He gave $\purpleD{24}$ magic beans to his best friend.

![Starting on the right with 89 move left minus 32 and goes to 57. From 57 minus 24 goes to 33. ](web+graphie:${☣ LOCALPATH}/images/edae8627d36683414e43a244e56114b1a9516219)

$57 - \purpleD{24} =33$

$\blueE{18}$ magic beans got planted.

![A number line starts at 15 on the left and 89 on the right. Starting on the right with 89 move left minus 32 and goes to 57. From 57 minus 24 goes to 33. From 33 minus 18 goes to 15.](web+graphie:${☣ LOCALPATH}/images/2854d739ccf72a57da0593ca5641bb671dc8d18e)

$33 - \blueE{18} = 15$

Here is the correct number line:

![A number line starts at ? on the left and 89 on the right. Starting on the right with 89 move left minus 32 and goes to 57. From 57 minus 24 goes to 33. From 33 minus 18 goes to ?.](web+graphie:${☣ LOCALPATH}/images/d3103354808e4853ab23d692cd4b96c7d7ccfd17)

Jack has ${15}$ magic beans left.

choices.content: ![A number line starts at ? on the left and 89 on the right. Starting on the right with 89 move left minus 32 to 57. From 57 minus 24 goes to 33. From 33 minus 18 goes to ?.](web+graphie:${☣ LOCALPATH}/images/d3103354808e4853ab23d692cd4b96c7d7ccfd17)
![A number line starts at 9 with plus 32 and goes to 41. From 41 plus 24 goes to 65. From 65 plus 18 goes to  ?.](web+graphie:${☣ LOCALPATH}/images/03668a9894784fd37455b4cf46d93cd8c29c2fb8)

assessment_items.question_content:
For his birthday, Max had $60$ balloons.  

He gave $15$ balloons to a friend, $15$ balloons to his sister, and $11$ balloons to a dog.         

**Which number line shows how to find how many balloons Max has left?**

[[☃ radio 1]]  

**How many balloons does Max have left?**

[[☃ numeric-input 1]] balloons
hints:
Max started with $\goldE{60}$ balloons.

![A number line is labeled 60  on the right side and extends to the left.](web+graphie:${☣ LOCALPATH}/images/a7d111f00e6b3caf1ca74e3c56b0bb41c996a205)

To subtract on the number line, we jump to the **left**.

He gave away $\maroonD{15}$ balloons to his friend.

![From the right at 60 with minus 15 goes to 45.](web+graphie:${☣ LOCALPATH}/images/40baaa6099476657a88681231fe2f485e077e0e2)

$\goldE{60} - \maroonD{15} = 45$

Then he gave away $\purpleD{15}$ balloons to his sister.

![From the right at 60 with minus 15 goes to 45. From 45 minus 15 goes to 30. ](web+graphie:${☣ LOCALPATH}/images/b7d7514a12d499526dd82e33dce4f2e4362431f5)

$45 - \purpleD{15} =30$

Last, he gave $\blueE{11}$ balloons to his dog.

![A number line starts at 19 on the left and goes to 60 on the right. From the right at 60 with minus 15 goes to 45. From 45 minus 15 goes to 30. From 30 minus 11 goes to 19.](web+graphie:${☣ LOCALPATH}/images/08812de35371b6b1d755f07c9bac96be862b780e)

$30 - \blueE{11} = 19$

Here is the correct number line:

![A number line starts at ? on the left and goes to 60 on the right. From the right at 60 with minus 15 goes to 45. From 45 minus 15 goes to 30. From 30 minus 11 goes to ?.](web+graphie:${☣ LOCALPATH}/images/da4a6100ff5fce67b7aeabcf018a1ae419795aee)

Max had ${19}$ balloons left.

choices.content: ![A number line starts at ? on the left and goes to 60 on the right. From the right at 60 with minus 15 goes to 45. From 45 minus 15 goes to 30. From 30 minus 11 goes to ?.](web+graphie:${☣ LOCALPATH}/images/da4a6100ff5fce67b7aeabcf018a1ae419795aee)

![A number line starts at ? on the left and goes to 100 on the right. From the right at 100 with minus 15 goes to 85. From 85 minus 15 goes to 70. From 70 minus 11 goes to ?.](web+graphie:${☣ LOCALPATH}/images/8514b4f0861a714edcede92d54a1375cfa21c326)

assessment_items.question_content:
The dragon ninja had $70$ total rubber stars.  

Then, the dragon ninja threw $12$ stars at a tree, $33$ stars at a target, and $22$ stars into the sky.       

**Which number line shows how to find how many rubber stars the dragon ninja has left?**

[[☃ radio 1]]  


**How many rubber stars does the dragon ninja have now?**  

[[☃ numeric-input 1]] rubber stars
hints:
The dragon ninja started with $\goldE{70}$ rubber stars.

![A number line is labeled 70 on the right end and extends to the left.](web+graphie:${☣ LOCALPATH}/images/3fe8878fa2de02c8b3c42de100f5d5a9cab4e674)

To subtract on the number line, we jump to the **left**.

He threw $\maroonD{12}$ rubber stars at the a tree.

![From the right at 70 with minus 12 goes to 58. ](web+graphie:${☣ LOCALPATH}/images/fbc38cd3058a6d81b1cf88f3559b08c18f74da70)

$\goldE{70} - \maroonD{12} = 58$

Then he threw $\purpleD{33}$ rubber stars at a target.

![From the right at 70 with minus 12 goes to 58. From 58 minus 33 goes to 25. ](web+graphie:${☣ LOCALPATH}/images/6960fd98824b44a691208826058eaae489291e0c)

$58 - \purpleD{33} =25$

Last, he threw $\blueE{22}$ stars in the sky.

![A number line starts at 3 on the left and goes to 70 on the right. From the right at 70 with minus 12 goes to 58. From 58 minus 33 goes to 25. From 25 minus 22 goes to 3.](web+graphie:${☣ LOCALPATH}/images/f6d146c152d7a30d8a7005a5d71123ac932b66fe)

$25 - \blueE{22} = 3$

Here is the correct number line:

![A number line starts at ? on the left and goes to 70 on the right. From the right at 70 with minus 12 goes to 58. From 58 minus 33 goes to 25. From 25 minus 22 goes to ?.](web+graphie:${☣ LOCALPATH}/images/0ec8acfd003b8c0415d7192fcd7240d0623771d5)

The dragon ninja had ${3}$ rubber stars left.

choices.content: ![A number line starts at ? on the left and goes to 100 on the right. From the right at 100 with minus 12 goes to 88. From 88 minus 33 goes to 55. From 55 minus 22 goes to ?.](web+graphie:${☣ LOCALPATH}/images/e5ce2493c546429bd4276941fd05c6de88ae14c0)

![A number line starts at ? on the left and goes to 70 on the right. From the right at 70 with minus 12 goes to 58. From 58 minus 33 goes to 25. From 25 minus 22 goes to ?.](web+graphie:${☣ LOCALPATH}/images/0ec8acfd003b8c0415d7192fcd7240d0623771d5)

assessment_items.question_content:
Grandpa brought a bag with $79$ pieces of food to feed the birds at the pond.   

Grandpa fed $14$ pieces of food to ducklings, $17$ pieces to seagulls, and $32$ pieces to swans.   

**Which number line shows how to find how many pieces of food Grandpa has left?**

[[☃ radio 1]]  

**How many pieces of food does Grandpa have left?**

[[☃ numeric-input 1]] pieces of food
hints:
Grandpa started with $\goldE{79}$ pieces of food.

![A number line is labeled 79 on the right and extends to the left.](web+graphie:${☣ LOCALPATH}/images/83fbb9c12a1bfd9d204dcdde5fd28b485583c5c1)

To subtract on the number line, we jump to the **left**.

He fed $\maroonD{14}$ pieces of food to the ducklings.

![From the right at 79 with minus 14 goes to 65. ](web+graphie:${☣ LOCALPATH}/images/7fb48ae7cb0b8a2342bcd0abfb5cebabcf2ad096)

$\goldE{79} - \maroonD{14} = 65$

Then he fed $\purpleD{17}$ pieces of food to the seagulls.

![From the right at 79 with minus 14 goes to 65. From 65 minus 17 goes to 48. ](web+graphie:${☣ LOCALPATH}/images/ef5c43c50a76a5296334614daba71b01b8298d0b)

$65 - \purpleD{17} =48$

Last, he fed $\blueE{32}$ pieces of food to the swans.

![A number line starts at 16 on the left and goes to 79 on the right. From the right at 79 with minus 14 goes to 65. From 65 minus 17 goes to 48. From 48 minus 32 goes to 16.](web+graphie:${☣ LOCALPATH}/images/7299e6bd99e71f98fc6fddb590083d079325d43b)

$48 - \blueE{32} = 16$

Here is the correct number line:

![A number line starts at ? on the left and goes to 79 on the right. From the right at 79 with minus 14 goes to 65. From 65 minus 17 goes to 48. From 48 minus 32 goes to ?.](web+graphie:${☣ LOCALPATH}/images/5b0e4e4fcd49a5420d46ad1e7f364f8e8f909488)

Grandpa had ${16}$ pieces of food left.

choices.content: ![A number line starts at ? on the left and goes to 97 on the right. From the right at 97 with minus 14 goes to 83. From 83 minus 17 goes to 66. From 66 minus 32 goes to ?.](web+graphie:${☣ LOCALPATH}/images/7af71456d6425acb1e5450a9a5b98a8a95976b20)

![A number line starts at ? on the left and goes to 79 on the right. From the right at 79 with minus 14 goes to 65. From 65 minus 17 goes to 48. From 48 minus 32 goes to ?.](web+graphie:${☣ LOCALPATH}/images/5b0e4e4fcd49a5420d46ad1e7f364f8e8f909488)

assessment_items.question_content:
Dian made $83$ paper boats and then set them afloat on a lake.

$25$ of Dian's boats sank, $33$ boats were ripped, and $13$ were eaten by fish.    

**Which number line shows how to find how many boats Dian has left?**

[[☃ radio 1]]  

**How many boats does Dian have left?**

[[☃ numeric-input 1]] boats
hints:
Dian made $\goldE{83}$ paper boats.

![A number line is labeled 83 on the right end and extends to the left.](web+graphie:${☣ LOCALPATH}/images/d0291a6f26dd1442865bf2ccfb5405aff4a2d98f)

To subtract on the number line, we jump to the **left**.

$\maroonD{25}$ of Dian's boats sank.

![From the right at 83 with minus 25 goes to 58. ](web+graphie:${☣ LOCALPATH}/images/8b657037e094c8526b2e53296dc39cc2ae86ece7)

$\goldE{83} - \maroonD{25} = 58$

$\purpleD{33}$ boats had a rip in them.

![From the right at 83 with minus 25 goes to 58. From 58 minus 33 goes to 25. ](web+graphie:${☣ LOCALPATH}/images/906e467ee90f92c7ffc1cc0c0fda37b35a2c831a)

$58 - \purpleD{33} =25$

$\blueE{13}$ boats were eaten by fish.

![A number line starts at 12 on the left and goes to 83 on the right. From the right at 83 with minus 25 goes to 58. From 58 minus 33 goes to 25. From 25 minus 13 goes to 12.](web+graphie:${☣ LOCALPATH}/images/0112da3f862586567c830d1d07c56aa2742d2965)

$25 - \blueE{13} = 12$

Here is the correct number line:

![A number line starts at ? on the left and goes to 83 on the right. From the right at 83 with minus 25 goes to 58. From 58 minus 33 goes to 25. From 25 minus 13 goes to ?.](web+graphie:${☣ LOCALPATH}/images/fade79cc0cf2df0b4c418cad7351b409e79522c0)

Dian has ${12}$ boats left.

assessment_items.question_content:
A palm tree had $92$ coconuts.  

Then, the palm tree lost $45$ coconuts in a storm, and $12$ coconuts were eaten by wild animals. $14$ coconuts fell off the tree.      

**Which number line shows how to find how many coconuts are left on the palm tree?**

[[☃ radio 1]]  

**How many coconuts does the palm tree have left?**

[[☃ numeric-input 1]] coconuts
hints:
A palm tree had $\goldE{92}$ coconuts.

![A number line is labeled 92 on the right end and extends to the left.](web+graphie:${☣ LOCALPATH}/images/707d61890a1fa603d703ebef7d1cc3adc6b3e0ec)

To subtract on the number line, we jump to the **left**.

$\maroonD{45}$ of the coconuts were lost during a storm.

![From the right at 92 with minus 45 goes to 47. ](web+graphie:${☣ LOCALPATH}/images/d17f50199d8b822765860cddae19bf09dee8e8e1)

$\goldE{92} - \maroonD{45} = 47$

$\purpleD{12}$ coconuts were eaten by animals.

![From the right at 92 with minus 45 goes to 47. From 47 minus 12 goes to 35. ](web+graphie:${☣ LOCALPATH}/images/54b22e30e49d07ce1fe767dbe27243e4d78a7355)

$47 - \purpleD{12} =35$

$\blueE{14}$ coconuts fell off the tree.

![A number line starts at 21 on the left and goes to 92 on the right. From the right at 92 with minus 45 goes to 47. From 47 minus 12 goes to 35. From 35 minus 14 goes to 21.](web+graphie:${☣ LOCALPATH}/images/bd7818418d5aefe5c05cd986ff47d5ae3ad14ea9)

$35 - \blueE{14} = 21$

Here is the correct number line:

![A number line starts at ? on the left and goes to 92 on the right. From the right at 92 with minus 45 goes to 47. From 47 minus 12 goes to 35. From 35 minus 14 goes to ?.](web+graphie:${☣ LOCALPATH}/images/49b254b43d069a505da2dd89e3379575c7f22a40)

There are ${21}$ coconuts on the palm tree.
